/usr/bin/ar qc libBulletPhysics.a CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/PhysicsBody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/PhysicsContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/PhysicsWorld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/environments/Atmosphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/environments/Geographic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/environments/Humidity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/environments/Wind.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/forces/Coriolis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/forces/Gravity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/forces/SpinDrift.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/forces/drag/Drag.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/external/forces/drag/DragModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/ballistics/terminal/Impact.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/builtin/bodies/RigidBody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/builtin/collision/Collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/builtin/collision/collider/BoxCollider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/builtin/collision/collider/GroundCollider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/geography/Coordinates.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/math/Integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BulletPhysics.dir/src/math/Vec3.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libBulletPhysics.a
